title: store: upsert_space_member always bumps state_seq even on no-op INSERT OR IGNORE
description: daemon/src/store.rs:1103-1110 — upsert_space_member() uses INSERT OR IGNORE but then unconditionally calls bump_state_seq('SpaceMember') without checking rows_affected. Every relay USER_JOINED event calls this, so repeated joins for the same user (reconnects, relay restarts) increment the state token with no actual change. JMAP SpaceMember/changes consumers will see spurious 'cannotCalculateChanges' or empty change sets on every reconnect. Fix: check rows_affected > 0 before bumping, same as upsert_chat_contact.
